violations.text: Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black/brown residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of brown/black residue. Ice machine is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Ambient temperature of milk dispenser observed at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service scheduled. Ice placed in bags around milk to keep milk in proper temperature until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023
